data.title: Two-factor Authentication
data.description: An additional layer of security requiring a secondary verification step for user logins.
data.technical_spec: Supports time-based one-time passwords (TOTPs) and SMS verification.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: User data is encrypted in transit and at rest to protect privacy and integrity.
data.technical_spec: TLS v1.2 or higher used for data in transit; AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Real-time Threat Monitoring
data.description: Continuous monitoring for suspicious activities or attempts to breach security.
data.technical_spec: Employs machine learning algorithms to detect anomalies in user behavior.

data.title: Account Recovery Protocols
data.description: Secure methods in place for users to recover accounts compromised by unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Multi-step verification process, including email and phone number validation.

data.title: Automated Mitigation Tools
data.description: Systems in place to automatically respond to detected threats to minimize damage.
data.technical_spec: DDoS protection layers and bot detection are implemented to shield the platform.
